tools.name: preflight_trade_action
tools.description: Parse a trade request and return an InjectiveLens pre-flight assessment.

tools.name: get_injective_account_state
tools.description: Return account and subaccount context from the selected read-only Injective adapter.

tools.name: get_market_snapshot
tools.description: Return market evidence from the selected read-only Injective adapter.

tools.name: get_open_positions
tools.description: Return open position context from the selected read-only Injective adapter.

tools.name: simulate_safer_trade
tools.description: Return a safer-trade simulation. No order is placed.

tools.name: get_latest_assessment
tools.description: Return latest persisted assessment and proof status when available.

tools.name: record_assessment_projection
tools.description: Return proof-recording instructions. MCP P0 stays read-only and does not mutate state.
